# Vendored GUI dependencies

These sources are committed directly so `KPT_BUILD_GUI=ON` configures and
builds without network access.

| Directory | Upstream tag | Commit | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| `imgui-1.92.8-docking` | `v1.92.8-docking` | `b61e56346a92cfcaf1f43a545ca37b0b32239654` | MIT |
| `glfw-3.4` | `3.4` | `7b6aead9fb88b3623e3b3725ebb42670cbe4c579` | Zlib |
| `ImGuiFileDialog-0.6.8` | `v0.6.8` | `ee77f190861193a995435c388682f1512f6fd29a` | MIT |

The imported trees contain no submodules and no `.git` metadata.
